INSERT INTO test_split VALUES ('hello world; 42'), ('apple, banana, cherry; 10'), ('one-two-three; four five six');
SELECT a.value FROM (SELECT regexp_split_to_table(input_string, ';? ') AS value FROM test_split) AS a WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.value FROM (SELECT regexp_split_to_table(input_string, ';? ') AS value FROM test_split) AS a WHERE value NOT LIKE '%[0-9]%;';
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, ref_value VARCHAR);
SELECT d.id, r.value FROM additional_data d JOIN (SELECT regexp_split_to_table(input_string, ';? ') AS value FROM test_split) r ON d.ref_value = r.value;
SELECT d.id, COUNT(r.value) FROM additional_data d LEFT JOIN (SELECT regexp_split_to_table(input_string, ';? ') AS value FROM test_split) r ON d.ref_value = r.value GROUP BY d.id;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT REGEXP_SPLIT_TO_TABLE('split_this_text;and_this_part;and_this_too', ';') AS cols) AS subquery WHERE cols LIKE '%text%';
